title: Cross Guild Dreams of the One Piece
description: On pages 3–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Dragon, Bonney, Unknown person #2, Celestial Dragons, Saturn as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Inside Pangaga Castle at the Holy Land of Mariejois...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PANT... PAINT...

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: You're SABO, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What...

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Jewelry Bonney?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think we're both after the same thing, so let's skip the small talk.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They broke into the guards' quarters...

dialogue.speaker: Celestial Dragons
dialogue.text: And stole the slave collar keys!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I did hear about Kuma-San having a daughter...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've always tried to keep tabs on revolutionary army activity.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's how...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...I know you're trust- worthy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll leave it to you guys to get Dad's body to safety!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Karasu.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What the-?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mission complete! Deliver the keys, and tell Morley to get Kuma and the others...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Back to HQ as soon as they're free.

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: What about you, SABO?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll be right behind you after I'm done here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Understood. Be careful.

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: What's your next move, Bonney?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm off to egghead to see whether...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Vegapunk has a way to restore Dad's mind!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And if he can't...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There they are!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's weird... I could've sworn I saw something...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PANT... PANT... It feels like they're fewer guards than ever around here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're too short-handed to cover a tower this big.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Haven't you heard? You can blame you know what for that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I... I owe you one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...what's that mean?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They're all gone because they saw it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...saw what?

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: The legendary Phantom Room.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You idiot! Don't talk nonsense like that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Thanks.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: egghead's in the new world,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're heading in the opposite direction... good luck on your voyage.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a little odd to see a "radical revolutionary" acting so friendly...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, we're both determined to save the same person.

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Yeah, look after my dad for me!

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
